title: Expense management Kenya SMEs: policy, approvals, claims, reconciliation
excerpt: A practical guide to expense management for Kenyan SMEs — a five-question policy template, layered approval workflows, petty-cash alternatives, end-to-end claims, multi-rail reconciliation, statutory touchpoints, and fraud red flags. Operations guidance for finance leaders, not legal or tax advice.
meta_title: Expense management Kenya SMEs — policy, approvals, reconciliation
meta_description: Practical expense management for Kenyan SMEs: a 5-question policy, layered approvals, petty-cash alternatives, claims workflow, M-Pesa + bank reconciliation, fraud red flags.
